nasb.text: Now when the enemies of Judah and Benjamin heard that the people of the exile were building a temple to the Lord God of Israel,

esv.text: Now when the adversaries of Judah and Benjamin heard that the returned exiles were building a temple to the Lord, the God of Israel,

cnv.text: 猶大和便雅憫的敵人聽見被擄回來的人為耶和華以色列的　神重建聖殿，

ccb.text: 犹大和便雅悯的敌人听说流亡者回来要为以色列的上帝耶和华建殿，
